response.justification: Bogdan is a strong fit. He brings 20 years of full-stack experience with current hands-on proficiency in the primary tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS, MongoDB), and is actively building AI-agent infrastructure in his present role—the most specialized required skill. His track record includes shipping at massive scale (millions of annual transactions), demonstrating maturity with performance and reliability. While Nest.js and PostgreSQL aren't explicitly mentioned, his deep Node.js and database foundations make these learnable details for a senior engineer. His TDD discipline, mentorship history, and open-source leadership indicate strong software craftsmanship and communication skills aligned with the role's values.
